svg.title: The message frame and its content-block types with exact JSON
svg.desc: A person or an AI app sends a request frame (headers plus a payload). The payload is a content array. Each content block type is shown with its exact JSON: text, image by base64, image by URL, image by file id, PDF document by base64, document by file id, text file as text, and a mixed multimodal frame.
svg.text: Every message is a FRAME — JSON over HTTP
headers + a payload of content blocks — sent by a person OR by your AI app
The content blocks — exact JSON (each is one item in content: [ ])
(a bare string is shorthand for this)
media types — images: jpeg · png · gif · webp
ONE FRAME, MANY BLOCKS — a real multimodal turn
Same FRAME, JSON over HTTP — whether a person types it or your AI app builds it. Only the content blocks differ.
